feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Sun guards his moon
entry.summary:
Author: chibithedragonkitty

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,432Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 86

Summary: A wealthy CEO in Metropolis wants the prince of Gotham, Bruce Wayne as his own. A very obsessive love but more of seeing Bruce as a possession, to be owned. Little does he know that a mild-mannered reporter secretly known as Superman isn't going to let that happen.

entry.title: Even If We Both Break Down
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,965Chapters: 7/7Kudos: 52

Summary: Bruce Wayne is the world's greatest detective. He can solve any crime, track any criminal, predict any outcome. But when it comes to love, he only knows one equation: caring equals loss.Now Clark's patience is wearing thin, and Bruce is finally forced to confront what he's been cataloguing all along: you can't protect someone by making them feel worthless. Sometimes the only thing more terrifying than losing someone is realizing you're losing them by choice.A character study about apologizing, about learning to be present instead of perfect, and about two men figuring out that love isn't a tactical problem to be solved—it's a choice to be made, again and again, even when the math says it's safer to run.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Into Dust
entry.summary:
Author: SoupofTime

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,519Chapters: 1/5Kudos: 1

Summary: The hopeless kingdom of Aurelion is doomed to fall at the hands of the demon horde looming ever close by the day, by the night rather. What will the last standing knight and the kingdoms creature, which haunts the manor on the west hill, do against a war long lost at its arrival.   or Superman and Batman gothic Dracula inspired story. Got the idea from the song "Only us" by the Miracle of sound+Karliene.The themes of each chapter match with a lyric from the song but not exactly in order.Superman is a Knight unknowing of his power, and Batman is a gargoyle like creature/protector of his manor.

entry.summary:
Author: MxDefyingGravity

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,653Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 420

Summary: One gala, one chance encounter, and suddenly you’re sharing a couch with Bruce Wayne and Clark Kent. They’re dating. They’re gorgeous. And for reasons you can’t quite understand, they both seem very interested in you.

entry.title: Can You Get Up Off Your Knees?
entry.summary:
Author: Gotham_Blight

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,935Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 20

Summary: Kal wants nothing more than to devour Bruce. There's a simple pleasure to taking apart the fearsome Dark Knight and putting him back together again. If only Bruce would embrace his role under Kal's thumb. He'd make such a pretty pet, after all. That's alright. Kal's more than willing to break him down piece by piece, until he's a sweet, mewling little thing. *Can be read standalone*

entry.title: If you want my bones, I shall give them to you
entry.summary:
Author: The_True_Reader

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,486Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 71

Summary: When a twenty-one year old Peter Parker died, he thought he'd at least get to complain to whatever God there was for his sorry life. He didn't expect to wake up in a cold, rainy, and unfamiliar place. He really didn't expect to be kidnapped immediately either. So, an average Tuesday in Peter Parker's life. --- Or, because I suck at summaries: Another typical Peter Parker in Gotham fic, except things aren't as typical as you would expect, and something feels really wrong.

entry.title: Every Billionaire has his Boy Scout Boyfriend and Adopted Acrobat Son
entry.summary:
Author: ChaosQueen1015

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,638Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 30

Summary: Thanos won and next thing Peter knows is he's lying on the ground of some strange city called Metropolis. Not 24 hours later he's been adopted by Clark Kent also known as Superman and is figuring out how to manage this new world and redevelop his hero identity, all while working with his new best friend, Dick Grayson, to figure out how to get their dads together.

entry.title: Agape, Pouring Out Of Me In Floods
entry.summary:
Author: NotCassia

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,239Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 53

Summary: He hadn't been actively looking at the billboards—he didn't make a habit of it while flying. He'd say it was mostly coincidence he'd even manage to come across it, but it had halted him mid flight regardless. He hadn't thought they'd use that shot for the billboard. Hell, he had thought he'd made sure it was unusable. Theatric and comical—anything but the cold, beautiful shot the crew had been looking for. But here it was, spanning the complete width and length of the billboard, Clark pressing a tender kiss to the space just next to Bruce's eye, just over his cheek. Holding him close with two arms snaked at his waist. Or >Anna@getannabortion everybody who's been praying on the downfall of this relationship lowkey suffering rn😭🥀 [an official promotional picture of Bruce in Clark's embrace, at the whims of his comical kiss—advertised by Vogue and Wayne Enterprises]37k likes 31 replies   >Supergirl's Wench@supergirl_swench #CRUCE SUPREMACY!!!🥳🥳🎉 [a picture of the viral Cruce photoshoot displayed on a digital billboard, taken in Gotham Square]78k likes 109 replies

entry.title: Two Months In Kansas
entry.summary:
Author: Superbat_fan02

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,309Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 7

Summary: Alfred forces Bruce to spend two months on vacation in Kansas, a small, sparsely populated town, to give him a break from his grueling training and the mental exhaustion of spending almost every night at his computer reading thousands of Gotham police reports. On this short trip, Bruce meets Clark, a boy a year younger than him who is his complete opposite. Clark is cheerful, honest, empathetic, and responsible. The golden boy of Kansas, always with a smile and a pleasant tone of voice. But Bruce doesn’t believe that’s the whole story. Clark lives on and grew up on the farm where there are reports of a UFO crash, and, mysteriously, his “parents”—who weren’t parents at the time—are now his parents. Was it really a coincidence that Clark appeared after this supposed UFO news? Furthermore, not to mention that Bruce was already considered tall and well-built for his age, Clark was even taller and bigger than him. He always seemed to hear more than he intended to, or would carelessly lift objects that would be a challenge even for adults to lift. Bruce was sure of it—there was something about Clark, and he wanted to find out what it was.

entry.title: A Little Spider Caught up in a Hood
entry.summary:
Author: FayeVilla418

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,992Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 345

Summary: Peter wakes up to green. He died. But he's alive. And in another universe too, neat. He breaks out of the glass tube He was in, goes feral, attacking the scientists that had him locked up. He has turned into more of a spider, he never used to have fangs or venom. The door gets broken down while Peter's jaws are still clamped down on a quickly fading flailing kidnapper. It's Red Hood. Red Hood takes in the situation and decides to take Peter, keep him at a safe house, under lock and key, away from the bats, who had gotten to the Lazura's pit just after Jason had left. Peter tries to accept these new changes and this new universe, knowing that there was almost absolutely no way back. And no one would look for him either. At least he has Jason. But the bats break into the safe house Pete's staying at and immedietly assume that Peter is Jason's bf. Anytime they try to deny it, it just feeds into their assumption. Oh well.

entry.title: Arisen The Bat
entry.summary:
Author: dexpair

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 49,672Chapters: 11/71Kudos: 11

Summary: On the streets of a Neo Gotham, old man Bruce Wayne lived his life as quite as possible. No more hero stuff, no more meetings with The League in space. His days were filled with silly conversations with his husband or listening to the dramas of his teenage son. It was an opposite reality to the one he had lived his whole life, but that's what made it special for him. However, on a special day, Bruce discovers that getting rid of his past life wouldn't be so easy. Ghosts from the past have returned, this time haunting his children, and The Dark Knight realizes he will have to act for his city and his family one last time.

  • Major Character Death

entry.title: The Man On The Mantle
entry.summary:
Author: Cabbage1995

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,763Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 80

Summary: After a night that pushed both the Man of Steel and the Dark Knight to their limits, Clark wakes up to a sight he never tires of: Bruce Wayne, completely relaxed and fast asleep in the quiet sanctuary of Wayne Manor. Intending to surprise Bruce with a decadent breakfast from across the Atlantic, Clark’s mission is sidelined by a discovery on the bedroom mantelpiece—a small, silver-framed photograph that proves exactly where Clark stands in Bruce’s guarded heart. What follows is a morning of high-end coffee, lingering touches, and a playful power struggle over who is more "distracting" in the light of day. Because as it turns out, even Superman can be rendered speechless by a naked billionaire and a well-placed picture frame.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
  • Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne
  • Clark Kent
  • Bruce Wayne
  • Love
  • Idiots in Love
  • Humor
  • Clark Kent Loves Bruce Wayne
  • Bruce Wayne Loves Clark Kent
  • Nudity
  • Sex
  • Family
  • Morning After
  • POV Clark Kent
  • Smut
  • Domestic Fluff

entry.title: The Error in Our Stars
entry.summary:
Author: Cabbage1995

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,887Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 115

Summary: Before leaving for a three-week deep-space mission with the Green Lanterns, Clark Kent sends one last text to the man he loves. He doesn’t notice when his phone’s autocorrect turns a hurried "I’m leaving now" into a devastating "I’m leaving you." While Clark is light years away and unreachable, Bruce Wayne is left in the crushing silence of Gotham, convinced his world has ended over a four-word text. Twenty-one days later, Clark returns to Wayne Manor expecting a homecoming kiss, only to be met with Jason Todd’s Kryptonite-laced fury and Bruce’s cold, shattered heart. In a house built on secrets and shadows, the World’s Greatest Detective must learn to look past the data to find the truth—and the engagement ring Clark has been carrying the whole time. A story of technical glitches, bruised jaws, and the terrifying vulnerability of believing you are loved.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
